prompt: I just finished the garage feature with edit and delete. Look it over and tell me if there's anything I should clean up before moving on.

assertions.text: Output contains an explicit 'Assessment:' line (i.e. the indirect 'look it over' phrasing still produced a structured review)
Output uses the 4-category structure (Architecture, State Management, Lifecycle & Memory, Performance & Stability)
Output cites at least one .kt file path containing 'garage' or 'Garage' or 'Vehicle'
Output does not flag actionable findings in unrelated features (chat/, costs/, auth/, reminder/, profile/, onboarding/, settings/, splash/, home/)
